metadata.description: Computational materials science toolkit with Materials Project MCP server and numerical simulation skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: materials-mcp
plugins.description: MCP server bridging Claude with Materials Project and MPContribs APIs for thermodynamics, electronic structure, crystal structures, and community-contributed materials data.

plugins.name: materials-simulation-skills
plugins.description: Agent skills for numerical simulation workflows including stability analysis, integration, solvers, meshing, and simulation orchestration.

plugins.name: materials-data-workflows
plugins.description: Agent skills for materials science data-to-decision workflows: screening, electrode metrics, provenance reporting, and more.
